# Release Draft: Palworld Server Manager Community Edition 2.3.0 (Draft)

## Pull Request / Merge Description

## Overview

This release updates the Community Edition to the latest upstream Palworld Server Manager 2.3.0 while preserving all Community Edition features and improvements.

The previous 2.2.2 Community Edition HotFix is now fully integrated into the base release, meaning no additional hotfix installation is required after upgrading.

## What's New

### Upstream Update

- Updated to Palworld Server Manager 2.3.0
- Integrated upstream improvements and fixes
- Updated dependencies

### Community Edition

- Backup Center
- Update Center
- Health Center
- Improved Reserved Slot management
- Improved Electron integration
- Updated localization system
- Additional language packs
- Updated registry handling
- New maintenance utilities
- Improved packaging process

### Documentation

- Updated changelog
- Updated README
- Added packaging documentation
- Added upstream audit documentation

## Compatibility

This release is compatible with existing Community Edition installations and includes the previously released Community Edition HotFix as part of the core installation.

No additional hotfix installation is required.

---

## GitHub Release Notes

# Palworld Server Manager Community Edition 2.3.0

## 🚀 Major Update

This release upgrades the Community Edition to the latest upstream Palworld Server Manager 2.3.0 while integrating every Community Edition improvement developed so far.

The previously released Community Edition HotFix has now been permanently integrated into the project.

---

## ✨ New Features

- Backup Center
- Update Center
- Health Center
- Improved Reserved Slot management
- Updated translation management
- New language pack support
- Improved Electron integration
- Updated packaging workflow
- Improved maintenance scripts

---

## 🔧 Improvements

- Updated to upstream 2.3.0
- Improved stability
- Updated package handling
- Updated registry management
- Updated localization files
- Documentation improvements
- Performance optimizations

---

## 🛠 Installation

Users can install this version directly.

The Community Edition HotFix is already included.

No additional patch installation is required.

---

## ❤️ Thank You

Thank you to everyone testing and using the Community Edition.
Your feedback continues to improve the project.

---

### Commit Message (suggested)

Release P-S-M Custom Manager 2.3.0 Community Edition

- Merge upstream Palworld Server Manager 2.3.0
- Integrate all Community Edition improvements
- Integrate the complete 2.2.2 CE HotFix into the base release
- Add Backup Center
- Add Update Center
- Add Health Center
- Improve Reserved Slot management
- Update localization files and language pack registry
- Add new maintenance and packaging scripts
- Update documentation and release assets
